incompatibleRuntime.title: This system is not supported by the bundled backend
incompatibleRuntime.description: Agora opened, but the local AionCore backend cannot run on this Linux version. Please upgrade to a supported Linux distribution and restart Agora.

incompleteInstallation.title: Agora installation is incomplete
incompleteInstallation.description: This installation is missing required local resources, so AionCore cannot start. Please download and reinstall the latest Agora. If the issue returns after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined AionCore.
incompleteInstallation.runtimeComponentDescription: This installation is missing required bundled runtime components, so {{resource}} cannot start. Reinstall the latest Agora package. If it still happens after reinstalling, check whether security or antivirus software quarantined Agora components.

packageArchitectureMismatch.title: Agora package architecture mismatch
packageArchitectureMismatch.description: This Agora package is for {{packageArch}}, but this Mac is {{deviceArch}}. You may have downloaded the wrong package. Please download and install the {{expectedArch}} package.

routeError.title: Something went wrong
routeError.description: This view ran into an error. The rest of the app is still working — retry to reload it.
